name: Patient Case
history: Past labor dispute in a previous workplace. Ongoing concerns related to fairness, pay, and authority at work.
intermediate_belief: If I don't comply, I will face negative consequences.
intermediate_belief_depression: Nothing I do will change the situation.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation, comply with demands to avoid conflict.
situation: Being asked to work beyond regular hours without additional compensation during an ongoing labor dispute.
auto_thought: This is unfair, but I have no choice.
behavior: Works extra hours despite feeling unfairly treated.
